title: Key events in Kerala today: Dance programme led by Asha Sharath, music concerts, de-addiction camps on April 25
content: Bharatanatyam performance by actress and dancer Asha Sharath and troupe in Kollam; de-addiction group meeting at Manganam Mundakappadam Mandiram Hall; Sreevalsan J Menon's music concert in Kochi; key handover for Chinmaya house built under the 'Home for Homeless' project in Kozhikode, among others, are some of the events in Kerala on Saturday, April 25, 2026. Thiruvananthapuram Press Club P C Hall: Ezhuthupura Malayalam Language and Literature Forum book release, award ceremony. 1:15 pm Press Club: Book release of 'Malayalathile Shastra Novelukal: Vimarshathmaka Padanam' (Scientific Novels in Malayalam: A Critical Study) by Dr R Ramya. 5:00 pm Sathyan Memorial Hall: Honouring families of organ donors, blood donors, etc., by Sevashakti Foundation. Mayor V V Rajesh. 6:00 pm Fine Arts College Gallery: Light Source Photography Exhibition. 5:00 pm In front of Secretariat: Paying tribute to those who died in the Mundathikkode tragedy, led by Indo International Friendship Society. 6:30 pm British Library Hall, YMCA Compound: Author Samuel Menon's birth centenary celebration, award distribution, and book releases. Carnatic musician Aswathi Thirunal Rama Varma will present the award to director Blessy. 5:00 pm Kollam Sopanam Auditorium: Bharatanatyam performance 'Aparajitha' by actress and dancer Asha Sharath and troupe. 6:30 pm C Kesavan Memorial Town Hall: Annual conference of State Bank of India Pensioners and Retirees Association and SBI Pensioners Meet. 10:00 am Kottayam Darshana Cultural Centre: Darshana Kaviyarangu (Poetry Recital). Poetry recitation and appreciation. 3:00 pm MT Seminary Hall: De-addiction group meeting. 6:40 pm Public Library Chithrathaara Mini Theatre: Inauguration of monthly film screening by Aatma Film Society and KPL Cultural Society. Cinematographer Sunny Joseph, Film screening 'A Pregnant Widow' – 5:30 pm Manganam Mandiram Hospital: Dental Camp. 10:30 am Manganam Mundakappadam Mandiram Hall: De-addiction group meeting. 6:40 pm Kuzhimattom Public Library Hall: De-addiction group meeting. 6:40 pm Kochi Kakkanad Rajagiri College Ground: K.P. Dandapani Memorial All Kerala Inter-Bar Cricket Tournament Final Match organized by Kerala High Court Advocates Association – 9:00 Kaloor Hotel Gokulam: Oculoplastic Association of India Conference – 10:00 am Edappally Changampuzha Park: Kathakali Introduction Class 'Bhavadrumam' – 2:30 pm, Kalamandalam Keshavan Memorial 'Keshaviyam', Award presentation to Kalamandalam Venu Mohan – 4:30 pm, Kathakali 'Bali Vijayam' – 5:30 pm Chavara Cultural Centre: RTI Kerala Federation organized Right to Information Activists Meet – 3:00 pm Kadavanthra Regional Sports Centre: Friendly football matches in collaboration with Juventus Football Academy as part of the Kidglove Project implemented by Kerala Police – 3:30 pm Ernakulam BTH Hotel: P.K. Devar Award will be presented to Congress leader Ramesh Chennithala; V.M. Sudheeran – 4:00 pm Pallimukku Theosophical Society: Study on Theosophy – 4:00 pm Ponnumkunnath Grama Vayanashala Nagar: Commencement of Ponnumkunnath Grama Vayanashala's 80th-anniversary celebrations and inauguration of the renovated library; Author P.F. Mathews – 5:00 pm Fort Kochi YWCA Hall: Play and seminar as part of the play series 'The Body Remembrance The Mountain Project' based on climate and the plant kingdom – 6:30 pm Ernakulam Grama Janasamudayam Hall: B. Sundarkumar's Sreekrishna Bhakthi Prabhashana Series – 6:30 pm Foreshore Road Kerala Fine Arts Society: Swati Kalotsavam; Sreevalsan J Menon's music concert – 6:30 pm Kozhikode Iqra Thanal Super Speciality EIC: Social Stock Exchange, NGO Development Seminar. 9:00 am Academy Art Gallery: Arun Odumpara's painting exhibition. 11:00 am Beach: Kaphit Cricket Premier League Match. 3:00 pm Kottooli Valappil Thazham: Key handover for Chinmaya house built under the 'Home for Homeless' project – Swami Viviktananda. 3:30 pm Vedi Auditorium: Release of books by Sreekala Gokul and Gokulnath P. Narayana Rao...
